info.title: Scrapingant API
info.description:
The only 2 things needed to start working with ScrapingAnt API: URL you'd like to scrape, and the API key. Provide them to /v2/general GET endpoint, and you'll get the scraped content. 
To send a POST / PUT / DELETE / PATCH request to the target url, send the POST / PUT / DELETE / PAST request to the main endpoint with your x-api-key and url parameters.

200.description: Successful response. ScrapingAnt web scraping API endpoint returns plain html content  of the scraped web page

422.description: Invalid value provided. Please, look into detail for more info.

400.description: Wrong request format. Make sure that you're using a proper JSON input.

403.description: The API token is wrong or you have exceeded the API credits limit.

404.description: The requested URL is not reachable. Please, check it in your browser or try again.

405.description: The API endpoint can only be accessed using the following HTTP methods: GET, POST, PUT, DELETE.

409.description: Concurrent requests limit exceeded. Please, try again or upgrade to the paid plan

423.description: The anti-bot detection system has detected the request. Please, retry or change the request settings.

500.description: Something went wrong with the server side code. Rare case. We're recommending to contact us in this case.

parameters.name: x-api-key
parameters.description: API token, required for authentication. You can find your API token on the dashboard page in the user's admin panel.

parameters.name: url
parameters.description: URL to scrape

parameters.name: browser
parameters.description: Enables using headless browser for scraping. Default: true

parameters.name: return_page_source
parameters.description: Enables returning data returned by the server and unaltered by the browser. Default: false. When true - JS won't be rendered. This feature works only with browser=true

parameters.name: cookies
parameters.description: Cookies to pass with a scraping request to the target site.

parameters.name: js_snippet
parameters.description: Base64 encoded JS snippet to run once page being loaded in the ScrapingAnt browser. This feature works only with browser=true.

parameters.name: proxy_type
parameters.description: Specifies proxy type to make request from. Default: datacenter. one of: datacenter, residential

parameters.name: proxy_country
parameters.description: Specifies proxy country to make request from. If not specified, the request will be made from a random country.

parameters.name: wait_for_selector
parameters.description: The CSS selector of the element our service will wait for before returning result. This feature works only with browser=true

parameters.name: block_resource
parameters.description: Block resource types. Prevents cloud browser from loading specified resource types. Can be repeated in case several resource types should be blocked. This feature works only with browser=true. Available resource types: document, stylesheet, image, media, font, script, texttrack, xhr, fetch, eventsource, websocket, manifest, other

200.description: Successful response. ScrapingAnt web scraping API endpoint returns plain html content  of the scraped web page

422.description: Invalid value provided. Please, look into detail for more info.

400.description: Wrong request format. Make sure that you're using a proper JSON input.

403.description: The API token is wrong or you have exceeded the API credits limit.

404.description: The requested URL is not reachable. Please, check it in your browser or try again.

405.description: The API endpoint can only be accessed using the following HTTP methods: GET, POST, PUT, DELETE.

get.description: Get current status of API credits usage
